mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unfreeze_application (user_id, reason, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{reason}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM unfreeze_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.reason, a.status, a.create_time, a.admin_id, p.real_name, u.username FROM unfreeze_application a LEFT JOIN user_profile p ON a.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
